response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the role requires an executive CTO with 5+ years senior technical leadership, production multi-agent AI systems experience, fintech infrastructure depth, and a track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+. The resume shows no people-management or executive leadership history, no production agentic-AI systems at scale, and only tangential fintech exposure. The gap between IC experience and CTO-level requirements is too large.
strengths: 15+ years polyglot engineering across distributed/event-driven systems
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, observability mindset)
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling teams to 30+
No production multi-agent AI systems in regulated/high-stakes environments

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
